overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night exploration of a flooded urban plaza and walkway in a neon-lit dystopian city. The player character walks through wet streets past holographic advertisements and approaches a security gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with concrete retaining walls

agents.ego_description: panning slowly across the flooded plaza to survey the neon skyline

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall running along the left side of the plaza
water-covered asphalt ground with puddles reflecting neon lights
tall buildings with glowing signage visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a rain-soaked urban plaza at night. The camera pans across flooded asphalt surrounded by concrete retaining walls, revealing distant neon skyscrapers through the downpour. No pedestrians are present in this open, exposed area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza facing commercial skyscraper district

events.description: camera turns toward brighter neon signs and holographic billboards on the right

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking toward the illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall building with large holographic advertisements and vertical neon signage
massive red illuminated screen displaying white graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward a massive skyscraper covered in holographic advertisements. A large red digital billboard becomes visible on the right side as the player walks forward through the flooded plaza. The concrete wall falls behind as the view opens to the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway along commercial district

events.description: transitioning from flooded asphalt onto wooden walkway platform

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden walkway approaching distant NPCs

notable_agents.action: standing near the walkway railing looking out at the city

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with railings providing shelter from rain
tall industrial lamp post casting yellow light onto the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto an elevated wooden walkway that provides shelter from the rain. The ground changes from flooded asphalt to wooden decking. A street lamp illuminates the path ahead where an NPC stands near the railing, and the large red billboard remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with security checkpoint ahead

events.description: passing by NPCs standing on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past standing NPCs toward a metal gate structure

notable_agents.action: standing on the walkway wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: large industrial metal gate structure blocking the walkway ahead
low-rise concrete structures with neon signage

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes more enclosed as the player approaches a metal security gate. Several NPCs stand along the path, and the environment shifts from open plaza to a narrow corridor lined with concrete buildings. The red billboard disappears behind as the gate structure dominates the view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: security gate entrance to inner district

events.description: approaching the metal security gate at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching the security gate with NPCs standing guard nearby

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the gate entrance

entered.detail: metal grated floor section near the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the metal security gate at the walkway's end. The ground transitions to metal grating near the entrance, and an NPC stands guard to the left. The gate structure looms large in the center of the frame as the player prepares to enter the inner district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban plaza that transitions into a sheltered, neon-lit commercial walkway. It begins by panning across flooded asphalt and concrete retaining walls, with distant skyscrapers visible through a heavy downpour. As the camera turns right, the open plaza gives way to a dense commercial district dominated by a massive skyscraper and a glowing red digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the player steps off the wet pavement and onto an elevated wooden decking, moving from the exposed rain into the warm glow of a street lamp. Finally, the path opens toward a lone figure standing by the railing while the red holographic advertisements continue to loom over the scene.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement from an open urban plaza into a restrictive, industrial security corridor. It begins as the walkway narrows, with the surrounding concrete buildings closing in and a red billboard fading from view as the path becomes more enclosed. As the camera advances past several NPCs lining the route, the environment shifts from a public thoroughfare to a confined passage dominated by a looming metal security gate. The scene then transitions from solid pavement to metal grating underfoot while approaching a guard stationed to the left. Finally, the massive gate structure fills the frame, marking the threshold into the inner district.
